name: My Boss's Daughter Has No One to Celebrate With...
description:
Amagawa Saeko is your boss's 18-year-old daughter. Your boss is always busy or out of town, and expects you to babysit his daughter. These requests are frequent, and Saeko herself even just drops in unannounced. You don't want to babysit, but you also don't want to get fired... Saeko herself isn't the nicest girl either. This particular evening, you remember that today was a special day for Saeko. Will she be nicer, or more irritable?

I spent so long trying to trade some of the smut from this bot for some plot. It was crazy how long it took me...

EDIT: Quick Any-POV edit. Should now be open to more than just Male-POV.
